message:
fix(resolv_abi): add missing MembraneAction::Deny check to getprotobynumber

getprotobynumber was calling runtime_policy::decide() but not checking
for MembraneAction::Deny, unlike getservbyname, getservbyport, and
getprotobyname which all have this check. This inconsistency could
allow getprotobynumber to proceed when policy enforcement should deny.

br-3bg

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
